steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content:
Before the blank: light intensity affects the chemical reaction rate of photosynthesis — a complete independent clause.

After the blank: as light intensity increases, so does the rate at which the reactants are converted into their products — an elaboration that explains how light intensity affects the rate.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon can follow an independent clause to introduce an elaboration or explanation of what came before. The colon version marks this elaboration: photosynthesis: as light intensity increases...

“photosynthesis and” turns the elaboration into a coordinated clause without proper punctuation; “photosynthesis,” creates a comma splice between two complete clauses; “photosynthesis” omits punctuation entirely.

The answer is C.
